facilities.description: Sunrise Adult Foster Home is a small residential care home in Tigard providing incontinence care, diabetes care, memory care, and medication management.
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 across 3 reviews on SeniorAdvisor (July 2026)
facilities.quality_basis: Oregon adult foster home (up to 5 residents) included on documented review evidence: 4.5/5 across 3 reviews on SeniorAdvisor (July 2026).

facilities.name: Grace Care Adult Foster Home
facilities.description: Grace Care Adult Foster Home sits in a quiet Gresham neighborhood and houses up to five residents in an open-concept, wheelchair-accessible home with private rooms. Daily housekeeping, laundry, and home-cooked meals are provided, and the home offers memory care.
facilities.review_note: 4.8/5 average overall experience across 6 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.quality_basis: Oregon adult foster home (up to 5 residents) included on documented review evidence: 4.8/5 across 6 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026).

facilities.name: Skyline Manor Care Home
facilities.description: Skyline Manor Care Home is a licensed care home in south Salem serving only five residents, including those with Alzheimer's and other forms of dementia.
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 across 5 reviews on SeniorAdvisor; 8 reviews / 8.8-out-of-10 score on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.quality_basis: Oregon adult foster home (up to 5 residents) included on documented review evidence: 4.5/5 across 5 reviews on SeniorAdvisor and 8 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026).

facilities.name: Stephenson Adult Care Home
facilities.description: Stephenson Adult Care Home is a residential foster care home in a southwest Portland neighborhood with a view of Mt. Hood, catering primarily to older adults. It offers spacious private rooms with private half-baths.
facilities.review_note: 5.0/5 across 6 reviews on SeniorAdvice.com (July 2026)
facilities.quality_basis: Oregon adult foster home (up to 5 residents) included on two positive signals: documented review evidence of 5.0/5 across 6 reviews on SeniorAdvice.com (July 2026), plus aggregator-reported longevity operating under the same owner since 2002.

facilities.name: Holistic Hands Care
facilities.description: Holistic Hands Care is a small memory-care and residential care home in Corvallis providing assistance with daily activities in a home setting.
facilities.review_note: 4.4/5 average overall experience across 7 reviews on A Place for Mom; 4.5 stars on SeniorAdvisor (July 2026)
facilities.quality_basis: Oregon adult foster home (up to 5 residents) included on documented review evidence: 4.4/5 across 7 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026).

facilities.name: Fulga's ACH
facilities.description: Fulga's Adult Care Home is a small Beaverton adult care home specializing in memory, diabetic, and incontinence care, with skilled nursing on site and both hospice and respite options. The owner has been a caregiver for over fourteen years and a nurse for over eight.
facilities.review_note: 23 reviews on A Place for Mom with a 10-out-of-10 review score, generally very positive (July 2026)
facilities.quality_basis: Oregon adult foster home (up to 5 residents) included on two positive signals: 23 largely positive reviews on A Place for Mom (10/10 review score, July 2026), plus aggregator-reported longevity operating since 2008.

facilities.name: Regina Adult Foster Home
facilities.description: Regina Adult Foster Home is a purpose-built five-bedroom adult foster home in Hillsboro owned and operated by Regina Asare, RN, who has more than 15 years of general and geriatric nursing experience.
facilities.review_note: 4.3/5 across 6 reviews on Assisted Living Center; 4.0 stars across 7 reviews on SeniorAdvisor (July 2026)
facilities.quality_basis: Oregon adult foster home (up to 5 residents) included on documented review evidence: 4.3/5 across 6-7 reviews on Assisted Living Center and SeniorAdvisor (July 2026).

facilities.name: Guardian Angel ACH
facilities.description: Guardian Angel ACH is a five-bed adult care home in Beaverton offering assistance with the activities of daily living.
facilities.review_note: 4.0 stars across 5 reviews on A Place for Mom; 4.5 stars on SeniorAdvisor (July 2026)
facilities.quality_basis: Oregon adult foster home (up to 5 residents) included on documented review evidence: generally positive reviews (A Place for Mom 4.0 across 5 reviews; SeniorAdvisor 4.5), July 2026.

facilities.name: Summer Crest A.C.H.
facilities.description: Summer Crest A.C.H. is an Oregon state-licensed adult care home in Beaverton offering 24-hour private care for up to five residents, with a focus on memory care and a registered nurse available around the clock.
facilities.review_note: 4.0 stars across 5 reviews on SeniorAdvisor / A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.quality_basis: Oregon adult foster home (up to 5 residents) included on documented review evidence: generally positive reviews (4.0 stars across 5 reviews, SeniorAdvisor/A Place for Mom, July 2026).

facilities.name: Pine Tree Care - AFH
facilities.description: Pine Tree Care is an adult foster home in Eugene offering foster care in a home setting with a garden area and comfortable private rooms.
facilities.review_note: 4.0/5 average overall experience across 4 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.quality_basis: Oregon adult foster home (up to 5 residents) included on documented review evidence: 4.0/5 across 4 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026).

facilities.name: Heightsview Care Home
facilities.description: Heightsview Care Home is a small residential care home in Beaverton operated by the same owner since 2007, with more than 20 years of caregiving experience.
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 average overall experience across 4 reviews on A Place for Mom; 4.5 stars on SeniorAdvisor (July 2026)
facilities.quality_basis: Oregon adult foster home (up to 5 residents) included on two positive signals: documented review evidence of 4.5/5 across 4 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026), plus aggregator-reported longevity operating under the same owner since 2007.

facilities.name: Corvallis Manor
facilities.review_note: Listed as a CMS Special Focus Facility (New designation) as of 2026 per StarPRO's SFF tracking list, meaning it has more deficiencies than most nursing homes and receives health inspections at least every 6 months (source accessed July 2026).
facilities.description: Corvallis Manor is a Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in Corvallis offering short-term rehabilitation and long-term nursing care. The facility has 135 certified beds. It is regulated by CMS and the Oregon Department of Human Services long-term care licensing program.
facilities.serious_concern_note: A federal CMS Special Focus Facility (newly designated) - nursing homes selected by CMS for extra oversight due to a documented history of serious quality problems.
facilities.concern_status: Active per CMS's Special Focus Facility tracking list - confirm current status directly

facilities.name: French Prairie Nursing and Rehabilitation Center
facilities.review_note: Named SFF Candidate #1 on StarPRO's Special Focus Facility candidate tracking list; a nursing-data aggregator reports a 1-star CMS overall rating as of April 2026 with $102,802 in fines on record (accessed July 2026). Some older secondary listings show a higher historical rating; verify the current rating directly at medicare.gov/care-compare.
facilities.description: French Prairie Nursing and Rehabilitation Center is an 80-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in Woodburn providing short-term post-acute rehabilitation and long-term custodial nursing care. It is part of the Volare Health group of skilled nursing providers.
facilities.serious_concern_note: CMS Special Focus Facility Candidate - on the federal list of nursing homes with a documented pattern of serious quality problems, one tier below active Special Focus Facility status.
facilities.concern_status: Candidate status - one tier below active Special Focus Facility - confirm current status directly

facilities.name: Gresham Post Acute Care and Rehabilitation
facilities.description: Gresham Post Acute Care and Rehabilitation is a Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in Gresham with 78 certified beds, offering short-term rehabilitation and long-term nursing care with 24-hour nursing supervision.

facilities.name: Hearthstone Nursing and Rehabilitation Center
facilities.review_note: CMS flags this facility with an abuse-citation icon on Care Compare. For at least one month between August 2024 and July 2025 it carried a documented pattern of poor care and was subject to additional CMS inspections. Willamette Week (Nov. 21, 2024) named it among Oregon facilities under state 'additional oversight' after a resident's leg was amputated following delayed treatment of an infected wound. Sources accessed July 2026.
facilities.description: Hearthstone Nursing and Rehabilitation Center is an 87-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in Medford offering short-term rehabilitation and long-term nursing care. It is operated by Volare Health.
facilities.serious_concern_note: Carried a CMS special-focus-pattern designation and an active federal abuse citation flag during 2024-2025 inspections.
facilities.concern_regulator: CMS (Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services) and Oregon DHS
facilities.concern_type: CMS abuse-citation flag; named on Oregon's public 'additional oversight' list
facilities.concern_date: Reported November 2024; CMS inspection window August 2024 - July 2025
facilities.concern_status: Confirm current status directly - the reported oversight window has since passed

facilities.name: Highland House Nursing and Rehabilitation Center
facilities.review_note: Consumer reviews cited by aggregator sites describe concerns including inconsistent use of bed alarms and delayed medication or assistance response (accessed July 2026); families should read current reviews directly before relying on this summary.
facilities.description: Highland House Nursing and Rehabilitation Center is a 119-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in Grants Pass providing short-term rehabilitation and long-term nursing care. It is operated by Volare Health.

facilities.name: Tierra Rose Care Center
facilities.review_note: A nursing-home data aggregator citing CMS records reports 42 substantiated complaints, 6 facility incidents, and 2 fines totaling $1,625 on file (accessed July 2026). One other secondary source lists a 2-star rather than 1-star overall rating; confirm the current figure at medicare.gov/care-compare.
facilities.description: Tierra Rose Care Center is a 76-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in Salem, first certified by CMS in 1980, providing intermediate and skilled nursing services.

facilities.name: Sapphire at Tigard Rehabilitation Center
facilities.description: Tigard Rehabilitation and Care is a 112-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in Tigard offering short-term rehabilitation and long-term nursing care.

facilities.name: Keizer Nursing and Rehabilitation
facilities.description: Keizer Nursing and Rehabilitation is a 49-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in Keizer offering short-term rehabilitation and long-term nursing care.

facilities.name: Portland Health and Rehabilitation Center
facilities.review_note: Aggregator sources report a component breakdown of health inspection 2 stars, staffing 4 stars, and quality measures 3 stars (overall 2 stars); the facility has paid 2 fines totaling $63,023 over the last three years. Reviews describe caring individual staff alongside reports of understaffing and slow call-light response. Confirm the current rating at medicare.gov/care-compare (accessed July 2026).
facilities.description: Portland Health and Rehabilitation Center is a 105-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in outer Southeast Portland offering short-term rehabilitation, long-term nursing care, and a memory care option.

facilities.name: Willamette Springs Memory Care
facilities.review_note: SERIOUS CONCERNS: Oregon DHS cited the facility for roughly 50 substantiated instances of abuse over the two years prior to December 2024 (OPB, Dec. 13, 2024; Willamette Week, Dec. 4, 2024). The state issued a proposed non-renewal of its operating license in September 2024 citing a 'pattern of repeated substantial noncompliance'; the facility passed a subsequent inspection in late 2024 and admission restrictions were lifted. A Place for Mom lists 5 reviews with an average 'overall experience' of 2.8 out of 5 (accessed July 2026).
facilities.description: Willamette Springs Memory Care is a 72-bed licensed memory care community in Corvallis operated by Mosaic Senior Living (Mosaic Management Inc.), serving residents with Alzheimer's disease and other forms of dementia. It has operated since 2016.
facilities.serious_concern_note: State inspectors substantiated roughly 50 abuse citations over two years, and the state proposed non-renewal of its license in 2024; the facility passed a later re-inspection and remains open.
facilities.concern_date: Reported December 2024, covering roughly the prior two years
facilities.concern_status: Oregon DHS proposed non-renewal of the facility's license in 2024; the facility passed a subsequent re-inspection and remained licensed as of the report - confirm current status directly

facilities.name: Powell Valley Assisted Living and Memory Care
facilities.review_note: SERIOUS CONCERNS: Oregon regulators substantiated findings of abuse and levied fines related to the facility's treatment of resident Donald Price, who was allegedly wrongfully evicted in 2022 following altercations with staff and later died; his family filed a $14 million wrongful-death lawsuit in Multnomah County Circuit Court (Willamette Week, March 28, 2024, and later reporting). Consumer review platforms show a range of positive and negative feedback (accessed July 2026); verify current standing before relying on this summary.
facilities.description: Powell Valley Assisted Living and Memory Care is a 115-bed licensed assisted living and memory care community on a four-acre campus in Gresham, offering studio, one-bedroom, and two-bedroom units.
facilities.serious_concern_note: State inspectors substantiated an abuse finding connected to a resident's death after a wrongful eviction; the incident is the subject of a $14 million lawsuit.
facilities.concern_type: Multiple state-substantiated neglect findings with fines (2020-2022) and a substantiated abuse finding (2023) in Oregon DHS licensing records
facilities.concern_status: The facility remains licensed and operating - confirm current status in the state licensing record directly

facilities.name: Brookdale Geary Street
facilities.review_note: Willamette Week (Nov. 21, 2024) named this community among Oregon facilities placed under state 'additional oversight' after inspectors found residents suffered serious falls and a technician gave a resident the wrong type of insulin. A Place for Mom scores it 7.5 out of 10 based on 10 reviews in the prior 2 years (accessed July 2026).
facilities.description: Brookdale Geary Street is a 44-bed assisted living and memory care community in Albany operated by Brookdale Senior Living, using the Clare Bridge memory care program for residents with Alzheimer's disease and dementia.

facilities.name: The Rawlin at Riverbend Memory Care
facilities.review_note: Willamette Week (Nov. 21, 2024) named this community among Oregon facilities placed under state 'additional oversight' after inspectors found the call-light system residents use to summon help was broken and staff weren't consistently monitoring it. A Place for Mom shows an average 'overall experience' of 3.9 out of 5 across 17 reviews all-time (accessed July 2026).
facilities.description: The Rawlin at Riverbend Memory Care is a 72-bed memory care community in Springfield serving residents with Alzheimer's disease and other forms of dementia, open 24 hours with on-site nursing oversight.

facilities.name: Wildflower Lodge
facilities.review_note: Willamette Week (Nov. 21, 2024) named this community among Oregon facilities placed under state 'additional oversight' after inspectors found staff didn't take reasonable precautions to stop a resident with a history of abuse from threatening other residents. Reviews are mixed: Caring.com shows 6 reviews and A Place for Mom shows 9 reviews with both praise for staff and complaints about communication and care consistency (accessed July 2026).
facilities.description: Wildflower Lodge is an assisted living and memory care community in La Grande with 43 assisted living apartments and 30 memory care apartments, operated by Compass Senior Living.

facilities.name: Sunnyside Meadows Memory Care
facilities.review_note: A November 13, 2025 Oregon re-licensure inspection found six deficiencies, including failure to complete an acuity-based staffing tool, inadequate staff training, and unlocked poison storage; state inspection records from January 2023 through November 2025 repeatedly cited insufficient direct-care staff training and competency (per aggregator citing Oregon DHS inspection data, accessed July 2026).
facilities.description: Sunnyside Meadows Memory Care is a 72-bed memory care community in Happy Valley for residents with Alzheimer's disease and dementia, currently operated as part of Ohana Ventures.

facilities.name: Maryville Nursing Home
facilities.organization_name: Sisters of St. Mary of Oregon
facilities.description: Maryville Nursing Home is a 165-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in Beaverton, sponsored by the Sisters of St. Mary of Oregon, offering short-term rehabilitation and long-term nursing care.

facilities.name: Willowbrook Post Acute
facilities.description: Willowbrook Post Acute is a 59-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in Pendleton offering short-term rehabilitation and long-term nursing care.

facilities.name: Prestige Post-Acute and Rehabilitation Center - McMinnville
facilities.review_note: Ranked lowest of the 15 senior living communities compared in the McMinnville area by one aggregator's proprietary scoring (6.4 out of 10), which cites a mix of positive rehabilitation-care feedback and documented operational concerns (accessed July 2026).
facilities.description: Prestige Post-Acute and Rehabilitation Center - McMinnville is a 96-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility operated by Prestige Care, offering short-term rehabilitation and long-term nursing care.

facilities.name: Rivercrest Post Acute
facilities.review_note: CMS overall star rating is reported inconsistently across aggregator sources: some list 2 stars (below standard) and others list 3 stars, as of sources accessed July 2026. Confirm the current official rating directly at medicare.gov/care-compare before relying on it. Formerly known as Oregon City Health Care Center.
facilities.description: Rivercrest Post Acute is a 53-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in Oregon City offering short-term rehabilitation and long-term nursing care.

facilities.name: Pilot Butte Rehabilitation Center
facilities.review_note: CMS overall star rating is reported inconsistently across aggregator sources: some list 2 stars and others list 3 stars, as of sources accessed July 2026. Confirm the current official rating directly at medicare.gov/care-compare before relying on it.
facilities.description: Pilot Butte Rehabilitation Center is a 74-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in Bend offering short-term rehabilitation and long-term nursing care.

organizations.name: Bonaventure Senior Living
organizations.description: Bonaventure Senior Living is a senior living operator headquartered in Salem, Oregon, with a portfolio of roughly 28 communities across Oregon, Washington, and Colorado. Its communities offer independent living, assisted living, and memory care. In Washington, the company entered a $7 million consent agreement with the state attorney general to improve services at 10 of its long-term care facilities.

organizations.name: Avamere
organizations.description: Avamere Family of Companies is a senior care organization headquartered in Wilsonville, Oregon, operating skilled nursing, post-acute rehabilitation, and senior living locations in the Pacific Northwest. After acquiring four Washington facilities, its footprint grew to roughly 32 facilities across Oregon and Washington.

organizations.name: Prestige Care
organizations.description: Prestige Care, Inc. is a family-owned senior care company headquartered in Vancouver, Washington, providing independent living, assisted living, memory care, and skilled nursing across eight Western states, historically with more than 70 locations. In 2024, PACS Group acquired the operations of 53 skilled nursing, assisted living, and independent living facilities from Prestige, so its current footprint is smaller than its historical peak.

organizations.name: Brookdale Senior Living
organizations.description: Brookdale Senior Living Inc. is the largest senior living operator in the United States, headquartered in Brentwood, Tennessee. As of March 31, 2025, it operated 647 communities across 41 states, serving approximately 58,000 residents through independent living, assisted living, memory care, and continuing care retirement communities, including multiple communities in Oregon.

organizations.name: Regency Pacific Management
organizations.description: Regency Pacific Management operates more than 40 licensed senior living communities across Washington, Oregon, Idaho, California, and Hawaii, housing over 3,000 residents. Its communities span independent living, assisted living, memory care, rehabilitation, respite care, and skilled nursing. Oregon locations include Fox Hollow in Bend and Regency Redmond Rehabilitation and Nursing Center.

organizations.name: Cascade Living Group
organizations.description: Cascade Living Group is a senior living operator headquartered in Bothell, Washington, with about 30 communities across Washington, Oregon, California, Nevada, and Arizona. Its portfolio ranges from active independent living to assisted living and integrated Alzheimer's and memory care communities, including Cascades of Bend in Central Oregon.

organizations.name: Hawthorn Senior Living
organizations.description: Hawthorn Senior Living manages all-inclusive independent living retirement communities under the Gracious Retirement Living brand across the United States and Canada. Its communities feature live-in managers, three chef-prepared meals daily, and bundled services in a single monthly rent. Stoneybrook Lodge in Corvallis is one of its Oregon communities.

organizations.name: Veterans Care Centers of Oregon
organizations.description: Veterans Care Centers of Oregon is a nonprofit organization that manages day-to-day operations of Oregon's state veterans homes on behalf of the Oregon Department of Veterans' Affairs, including the Edward C. Allworth Veterans' Home in Lebanon and the Oregon Veterans' Home in The Dalles. The homes provide skilled nursing, rehabilitation, and memory care for veterans and eligible family members.

organizations.name: Marquis Companies
organizations.description: Marquis Companies is a family-owned senior care company headquartered in the Portland suburb of Milwaukie, Oregon, operating skilled nursing, post-acute rehabilitation, assisted living, and memory care facilities in Oregon, California, and Nevada. The company also runs Consonus Healthcare, a pharmacy and rehab services affiliate.

organizations.name: The Springs Living
organizations.description: The Springs Living is a privately held senior living company founded in 1996 by Fee Stubblefield and headquartered in McMinnville, Oregon. It operates independent living, assisted living, and memory care communities across Oregon and Montana, with a heavy concentration in the Portland metro area including Lake Oswego, Happy Valley, Hillsboro, Beaverton, Wilsonville, and Sherwood. The company acquired the Hearthstone communities in Beaverton, rebranding them under The Springs name.

organizations.name: Leisure Care
organizations.description: Founded in 1976 and headquartered in Seattle, Leisure Care is one of the nation's largest privately held retirement and assisted living companies. It manages independent living, assisted living, and memory care communities across the western United States and beyond, emphasizing a hospitality-driven operating style.

organizations.name: Senior Lifestyle
organizations.description: Senior Lifestyle is a Chicago-based senior housing operator founded in 1985 that owns and manages more than 100 independent living, assisted living, and memory care communities across the United States. In the Portland metro area it operates Courtyard Fountains in Gresham.

organizations.name: Merrill Gardens
organizations.description: Merrill Gardens was founded in 1993 with a single community in Seattle and has grown to operate about 65 senior living communities across 17 states. Part of the R.D. Merrill family of companies, it offers independent living, assisted living, and memory care, and has absorbed several former Leisure Care-managed communities, including the former Ackerly at Sherwood in Oregon.

organizations.name: Senior Resource Group
organizations.description: Senior Resource Group (SRG) is a California-based developer and operator of senior living communities offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care in multiple states across the western and southern United States. Its Oregon portfolio includes SpringRidge at Charbonneau in Wilsonville.

organizations.name: HumanGood
organizations.description: HumanGood is one of the nation's largest nonprofit senior living providers, formed in 2016 through the merger of American Baptist Homes of the West and be.group. It operates Life Plan Communities (CCRCs) and affordable senior housing communities in multiple states, including Hillside in McMinnville, Oregon.

organizations.name: Trustwell Living
organizations.description: Senior living operator founded in 2021 by Larry Cohen, former CEO of Capital Senior Living. Trustwell operates about 40 communities across the Western, Central, and Southern United States, providing independent living, assisted living, and memory care.

organizations.name: Sunshine Retirement Living
organizations.description: Senior living operator headquartered in Bend, Oregon, managing 41 retirement communities across 18 states. Sunshine offers senior apartments, independent living, assisted living, and memory care, with an emphasis on all-inclusive independent retirement living.

organizations.name: Radiant Senior Living
organizations.description: Family-owned senior living company formed in mid-2011 and headquartered in Portland, Oregon. Radiant operates communities in Oregon, Washington, Montana, Colorado, Nevada, and Idaho, employing over 1,000 staff and serving more than 1,260 residents across all levels of care.

organizations.name: Cogir Senior Living
organizations.description: U.S. senior living management arm of Canadian real estate group Cogir, headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona. Cogir Senior Living operates a large portfolio of independent living, assisted living, and memory care communities across the United States, including several in Oregon.

organizations.name: Compass Senior Living
organizations.description: Compass Senior Living is a Eugene, Oregon-based operator of independent living, assisted living, and memory care communities in the western and central United States, including The Suites in Grants Pass and Morrow Heights in Rogue River. The company describes its guiding values as goodness, loyalty, faith, and fun.

organizations.name: MBK Senior Living
organizations.description: MBK Senior Living is an Irvine, California-based senior living operator and a subsidiary of Mitsui & Co., managing independent living, assisted living, and memory care communities across the western United States. Its portfolio includes Crystal Terrace of Klamath Falls in southern Oregon.

organizations.name: Avamere Family of Companies
organizations.description: Founded in 1995 and headquartered in Wilsonville, Oregon, Avamere operates a full continuum of senior care including independent living, assisted living, memory care, skilled nursing, and rehabilitation. Its footprint includes more than 30 facilities concentrated in Oregon and Washington, with additional locations in other Western states.

organizations.name: Westmont Living
organizations.description: Westmont Living is a family-owned senior living company operating full-service independent living, assisted living, and memory care communities since 1996, primarily in California and Oregon. Its Oregon communities include Oceanview Senior Living in Newport and Lakeview Senior Living in Lincoln City.

organizations.name: Providence
organizations.description: Providence is one of the largest not-for-profit Catholic health systems in the United States, serving communities across seven Western states. Alongside hospitals and clinics, it operates senior services including the Providence Senior Village campus in Hood River, Oregon, home to Providence Down Manor independent living and Providence Brookside Manor assisted living and memory care.

organizations.name: Generations LLC
organizations.description: Generations LLC is a family-owned senior living company that has served seniors since 1943, developing and operating multi-level retirement campuses in the western United States. Its Oregon communities include CherryWood Village in Portland.

organizations.name: Holiday by Atria
organizations.description: Holiday by Atria is one of the nation's largest independent living operators, managing roughly 240 retirement communities across the United States. Founded in 1971 as Holiday Retirement, the brand became part of Atria Senior Living in 2021; its Oregon communities include Sheldon Oaks in Eugene and Edgewood Downs in Beaverton.

organizations.name: Cedar Sinai Park
organizations.description: Cedar Sinai Park is a Portland, Oregon nonprofit senior care organization rooted in Jewish values, operating a campus in southwest Portland that includes the Robison Jewish Health Center skilled nursing facility and the Rose Schnitzer Manor assisted living community.

organizations.name: Onelife Senior Living
organizations.description: Onelife Senior Living develops and operates senior living communities in the Pacific Northwest, with a focus on memory care. Its Oregon communities include Battle Creek Memory Care in Salem, a sister community in Stayton, and Middlefield Oaks in Cottage Grove.

organizations.name: Life Care Centers of America
organizations.description: Life Care Centers of America is a privately held operator of skilled nursing and rehabilitation facilities founded in 1970, with communities in dozens of states. Its Oregon centers provide post-hospital rehabilitation and long-term nursing care.

organizations.name: Cascadia Healthcare
organizations.description: Cascadia Healthcare is a skilled nursing and post-acute rehabilitation operator with facilities across the western United States. Its Oregon location in Eugene provides short-term rehab and long-term nursing care.

organizations.name: Koelsch Communities
organizations.description: Koelsch Communities is a family-owned senior living operator founded in 1958, running assisted living, memory care, and independent living communities across several states. It operates Markham House assisted living in Portland.
